use_cases: Landing page hero sections with immersive 3D fluid animations
Interactive brand presentations with mouse-responsive visuals
Gaming and entertainment site hero sections
Modern SaaS landing pages with visual impact
ai_summary: A 3D fluid animation hero component built with React Three Fiber and custom GLSL shaders. Features real-time mouse interaction, morphing fluid shapes using Simplex noise, and post-processing bloom effects. Creates immersive dark-themed landing page experiences with continuously animated gradients that respond to cursor movement.
